ddls:
CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Category name */,
  "description" TEXT /* Category description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_mm" INTEGER /* Size of the product variation in mm */,
  "colour" TEXT /* Colour of the product variation */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_prices_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Customer name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer email */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Warehouse location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Warehouse capacity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_options" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping option */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateway" (
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "gateway_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment gateway */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_payments_gateway_id FOREIGN KEY ("gateway_id") REFERENCES payment_gateway ("gateway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_analytics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
